title: Gambler's Fallacy
description: Slot machine, gambling, and a gambling weapon
body: # Gambler's Fallacy *A mod that adds gambling to minecraft* Compatible with [combat amenities](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-amenities) ## Features - A custom Weapon that randomly switches between 64 states on right click - A slot machine, which is how you get the weapon, and other goodies - Chips, used to gamble at the slot machine, you can also use kelp (because it kinda looks like money) Good luck gambling!!! ![Live Gambling Reaction](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01e206515ee6180a3d126a9efea62f1e89f27ed4.png)
